{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Blades of Shadow
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Blades of Shadow]] is a technique used by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
